The '''''Qel-Droma''''' was a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] once captained by [[Tash Scrambas]] during the [[Alderaan Ascendancy Contention]].

==Behind the scenes==
According to ''[[What's The Story?]]'' author [[Aidan Hennessy]], the ''Qel-Droma'' was originally called the ''[[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]'', and was specified as being an [[Alderaanian War Frigate]].<ref name="Blog-QuentinGeorge|3">{{Blog|QuentinGeorge|3|Pello Scrambas…uh….Scambras….whatever - Behind the Scenes}}</ref>
